chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5914 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on Misc. No.26245/2024 2. For hearing of main case 20.01.2025 Mr. K.A. Vaswani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Petitioner seeks employment in a Government department on the basis of deceased quota / son quota. The Supreme Court has already declared the same to be unlawful vide judgment dated 26.09.2024 in the case of General Post Office Islamabad vs. Muhammad Jalal (Civil Petition No.3390 of 2021). It has also been reported that Rule 11-A of the Sindh Civil Servants (Appointment, Promotion & Transfer) Rules, 1974, has already been deleted by the Sindh Cabinet on 04.12.2024. In view of the foregoing this petition is prima facie misconceived, hence, the same is dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
